serverInfo.name: Merc Majah
serverInfo.description: Official MCP server for rap artist Merc Majah. Provides AI agents with authoritative, real-time information about the artist — biography, discography, music videos, press coverage, social links, and contact info.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Get the complete profile of Merc Majah including biography, discography, music videos, press quotes, social links, and contact information.

tools.name: get_bio
tools.description: Get Merc Majah's biography — background, origin, history, and artistic identity.

short.description: If true, returns the short summary bio instead of the full biography

tools.name: get_discography
tools.description: Get Merc Majah's discography — all albums, EPs, singles, and mixtapes with streaming links.

tools.name: get_music_videos
tools.description: Get Merc Majah's music videos with watch links.

tools.name: get_social_links
tools.description: Get all of Merc Majah's social media profiles and streaming platform links.

tools.name: get_press_quotes
tools.description: Get press quotes, media coverage, and critical acclaim for Merc Majah.

tools.name: get_contact_info
tools.description: Get Merc Majah's booking and press contact information.

tools.name: get_merch
tools.description: Get Merc Majah's official merchandise — current item available for purchase with name, price, description, and a direct Stripe buy link.

tools.name: buy_merchandise
tools.description: Generate a direct Stripe checkout link for purchasing Merc Majah official merchandise. Returns the payment link for immediate checkout.
